name: pnp-list-formatting-date-range-format
title: Overdue Date
shortDescription: This example colors the current field red when the value inside an item's DueDate is before the current date/time. Unlike some of the previous examples, this example applies formatting to one field by looking at the value inside another field. Note that DueDate is referenced using the [$FieldName] syntax. FieldName is assumed to be the internal name of the field. This example also takes advantage of a special value that can be used in date/time fields - `@now`, which resolves to the current date/time, evaluated when the user loads the list view.
longDescription: This example colors the current field red when the value inside an item's DueDate is before the current date/time. Unlike some of the previous examples, this example applies formatting to one field by looking at the value inside another field. Note that DueDate is referenced using the [$FieldName] syntax. FieldName is assumed to be the internal name of the field. This example also takes advantage of a special value that can be used in date/time fields - `@now`, which resolves to the current date/time, evaluated when the user loads the list view.

references.name: Użyj formatowania kolumn do dostosowania SharePoint
references.description: Możesz użyć formatowania kolumn, aby dostosować sposób wyświetlania pól na listach i w bibliotekach SharePoint. W tym celu tworzysz obiekt JSON opisujący elementy wyświetlane wtedy, gdy pole jest uwzględnione w widoku listy, oraz style stosowane do tych elementów. Formatowanie kolumn nie zmienia danych elementu listy ani pliku; zmienia jedynie sposób ich wyświetlania użytkownikom przeglądającym listę.
